themes: Multi-location manager fatigue: The vast majority of contacts are Managers across franchise, residential, hospitality, and fitness brands, suggesting a recurring pain point with the complexity and time cost of managing reports, workflows, and location data at scale in SOCi.

Long-tail urgency across enterprise accounts: Wait times range from 6 to 358 days, with a significant cluster beyond 100 days, indicating systemic follow-through gaps and the risk of eroding trust with high-value multi-location customers.

Repeat accounts signal unresolved needs: Several brands — including Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Anytime Fitness, Ford, Vetcor, 29th Street Living, and Avenue5 Residential — appear multiple times, pointing to either multiple stakeholders with the same concern or ongoing issues that prior outreach did not fully resolve.
